calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-18-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Jun-13-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
This matter was set for Prove- Up for a Request for Default Judgment against Defendant Tyrone Anthony Strickland.

Dept:505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record", commencing at 9:53:05 a.m. and concluding at 10:10:35 a.m.(D505)

Adam Brumage, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff Nike, Inc.
Dan Laboue, sworn to testify for the Plaintiff.

Counsel provide a summary of the case and proof for the request of judgment.
The Court examines witness. Witness testifies.

Good cause appearing, the Court finds that the Plaintiff has proven its prima facie case and rules in favor of the Plaintiff against the Defendant as follows:

The Plaintiff shall recover from the Defendant:

Damages $439,599.06
Pre-Judgment Interest at 10% $0
Costs $506.02
Attorney's Fees $5,000.00
Other $0

Total Judgment $445,105.08

Proposed judgment as modified signed and executed this day.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-16-2025 Continued To Jul-16-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion For Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar May-30-2025 Continued To Jun-13-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter;

Plaintiff Nike, Inc. appearing represented by Adam Brumage, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Tyrone Anthony Strickland is not appearing.

Per Local Rule 2.7.B.3, no courtesy copies were provided to dept. 505 prior to the hearing.

This matter is continued to Jun 13, 2025 at 9:00am in dept. 505 to allow Petitioner an oppertunity to provide the copies to this department.

Notice Of Motion For Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Mar-21-2025 Continued To May-30-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for request for judgment against Defendant Tyrone Anthony Strickland.

Dept:505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K.Valdes ; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" commencing at 9:45:25 a.m. and concluding at 9:51:03 a.m.(D505)

Adam Brumage, Esq. representing Plaintiff Nike, Inc. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Tyrone Anthony Strickland not appearing.

The plaintiff requests a 60-day continuance of the matter for witness appearance.

The Court continues the matter to May 30, 2025, at 9:00 a.m in Dept.505.
